creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
ashish      2010-07-05 17:36:12 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    graphics             Makefile 
  Added files:
    graphics/zathura     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  zathura is a highly customizable and functional PDF viewer based on the poppler
  rendering library and the gtk+ toolkit. The idea behind zathura is an
  application that provides a minimalistic and space saving interface as well as
  an easy usage that mainly focuses on keyboard interaction.
  
  WWW: http://zathura.pwmt.org/
  
  PR:             ports/148347
  Submitted by:   Quentin Stievenart <acieroid at awesom.eu>
  Approved by:    tabthorpe (mentor)
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1333    +1 -0      ports/graphics/Makefile
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/graphics/zathura/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/graphics/zathura/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/graphics/zathura/pkg-descr (new)
